synopsis: The illustrious Jabba bids you welcome to the underworld. Join the scoundrel Kay Vess in the first-ever open world Star Wars game, Star Wars Outlaws, where the Hutt and countless other kingpins and crime bosses are waiting to give you your next big job, or put a bounty on your head if you fail them. Now it's your turn. Grab your favorite jacket, holster your blaster, and make sure Nix is still hanging on the back of your speeder bike. You're going to need his help if you hope to survive the underworld.
title: Outlaws
